name: sigsci-update-alert

outputs.name: There is no context output for this command.

outputs.description: The unique ID of the alert. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.SiteID The ID of the site.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.CreatedDate

outputs.description: The name of the tag whose occurrences the alert is watching. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.LongName A short description of the alert.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.TagName

outputs.description: The number of minutes of past traffic to examine. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.Threshold The number of occurrences of the tag in the specified interval that are required to trigger the alert.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.Interval

outputs.description: The number of seconds that this alert is active. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.SkipNotifications A flag to disable external notifications - Slack, webhooks, emails, and so on.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.BlockDurationSeconds

outputs.description: A flag to toggle this alert. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.Action A flag that describes what happens when the alert is triggered.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.Enabled

outputs.description: date The timestamp of event (RFC3339 format).
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Alert.CreatedDate
